q.en: About how much sugar does the average American eat in a year?
q.zh: 普通美国人一年大约吃多少糖？

options.en: Over 500 pounds according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 超过500磅（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book states 'The average American ... eats just over 150 pounds (68 kg) of sugar a year.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'普通美国人一年吃掉的糖略多于150磅（68公斤）。'

q.en: What is table sugar (sucrose) made from?
q.zh: 餐桌糖（蔗糖）是用什么做的？

options.en: Salt and water according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 盐和水的混合物（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The text says 'Table sugar is sucrose. Sucrose comes from sugar cane or sugar beets.'
explain.zh: 文中说'餐桌糖是蔗糖。蔗糖来自甘蔗或甜菜'。

q.en: Why is sugar added to ketchup and pasta sauce?
q.zh: 为什么番茄酱和意面酱里要加糖？

options.en: Tomatoes taste bitter when cooked, so sugar removes the bitter taste
options.zh: 番茄煮熟后会发苦，加糖能去除苦味

options.en: Because they are sweet foods according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 因为它们本身就是甜食（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book explains tomatoes 'contain acids that can give them a bitter taste when cooked,' so sugar is added to remove it.
explain.zh: 书中解释番茄'含有酸，煮熟后会发苦'，所以加糖来去除苦味。

q.en: What does the body do with sugar it does not use?
q.zh: 身体把用不完的糖变成什么？

options.en: Turns it into fat and stores it
options.zh: 把它转化成脂肪储存起来

options.en: Sends it to the brain only according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 只送到大脑（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The text says 'it changes the sugar to fat and stores it for later' when too much sugar comes in.
explain.zh: 文中说当过多糖分进入体内，身体'把糖转化为脂肪并储存起来以备后用'。

q.en: Why did the author write this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的目的是什么？

options.en: To teach how to bake cookies according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 教人烤饼干（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: To inform readers that sugar hides in many foods and affects health
options.zh: 告知读者糖藏在许多食物中并影响健康

explain.en: The focus question is 'What happens to our bodies when we eat sugar?' showing the book aims to teach about hidden sugar.
explain.zh: 焦点问题是'我们吃糖时身体会发生什么？'，说明本书旨在讲解隐藏的糖。

q.en: Which breakfast cereal in the book had the MOST sugar per cup?
q.zh: 书中哪种早餐麦片每杯含糖量最高？

explain.en: The chart lists Raisin Bran at 18g, the highest of the cereals shown.
explain.zh: 表格中葡萄干麦片为18克，是所列麦片中最高的。

q.en: What does the suffix '-ose' at the end of lactose, fructose, and glucose tell you?
q.zh: lactose、fructose、glucose 这些词尾的'-ose'表示什么？

options.en: The word is a type of fish according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 这个词指一种鱼（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The word is a kind of sugar

explain.en: The 'WORD WISE' note says the suffix -ose 'identifies things as sugars.'
explain.zh: '词汇须知'一栏说明后缀 -ose'用来标识糖类物质'。

options.en: A simple sugar that is a major energy source for the body
options.zh: 一种为身体提供主要能量的单糖

options.en: A red food coloring according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一种红色食用色素（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines glucose as 'a simple sugar that is a major energy source for the body.'
explain.zh: 词汇表把葡萄糖定义为'为身体提供主要能量的一种单糖'。

q.en: What are two ways the book suggests to limit added sugar?
q.zh: 书中建议用哪两种方法来减少添加糖？

options.en: Eat more natural food and read food labels
options.zh: 多吃天然食物并阅读食品标签

options.en: Skip all meals according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 跳过所有正餐（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book advises eating 'more natural food and less prepared food' and 'read labels on packaged foods.'
explain.zh: 书中建议'多吃天然食物、少吃加工食品'，并'阅读包装食品上的标签'。

q.en: What is the main message about sugar?
q.zh: 关于糖，这本书的核心信息是什么？

options.zh: 糖最适合给汽车提供动力

options.en: It can be almost anywhere, so pay attention to what you eat
options.zh: 它几乎无处不在，要注意自己吃的东西

options.en: Sugar is always bad and must be avoided according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 糖总是有害，必须完全避免（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The ending says sugar 'can be almost anywhere' and 'it's important to pay attention to what we eat.'
explain.zh: 结尾说糖'几乎无处不在'，并且'注意我们吃的东西很重要'。

prompt.en: Look at three foods you ate today. Which one probably had the most added sugar, and how could you check?
prompt.zh: 看看你今天吃的三样食物。哪一样可能添加了最多的糖？你该怎么去核实？

en: Suggest reading the ingredient label to check.
zh: 建议通过阅读配料表来核实。
